title: Hypericophyllum congense
taxonomy: Hypericophyllum congense is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Old World. Hypericophyllum congense belongs to the genus Hypericophyllum, which is a group of flowering plants that are often characterized by their showy inflorescences. The species is a member of the tribe Vernonieae, which comprises various species of flowering plants found in tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. Within the kingdom Plantae, Hypericophyllum congense is classified as a dicotyledonous angiosperm.
